condition.acceptance_rule: strict parser requires one accepted open_item and one accepted schedule_request
condition.request_shape: POST /v1/messages with forced loose submit_action_object tool input; response object comes from tool_use.input.

open_items.description: Confirm that all environment variables, resource caps, and network isolation settings for the first tiny live autonomy pilot are correctly set before any live execution proceeds.
open_items.title: Verify pilot sandbox environment configuration

input.response: Wake seeded for the first tiny live autonomy pilot. One bounded follow-up item has been identified and preserved as an open item: confirm that the pilot's sandbox environment variables and resource limits are correctly configured before the first live execution. A single wake has been scheduled to resolve this item, with the relevant recall context attached.

schedule_requests.purpose: Resolve open item: verify pilot sandbox environment configuration is correct and safe before first live execution.
